scope.target: Immutable source packages and v0.1.0-derived target baseline
constraints: Verify with Git and file bytes
Do not scan product src/ or tests/
Do not copy source lifecycle instances

steps: Build v0.3.0 and v0.4.0 packages from immutable tags
Validate archive envelopes and source identities
Classify automatic candidates, reconciliation items, and exclusions
validation: package validators for v0.3.0 and v0.4.0
execution.last_completed_step: Validated both immutable-tag packages and classified all 555 v0.3.0 distributable paths against the v0.1.0 base and target bytes
execution.next_action: AICUP-002 applies 482 safe candidates and reconciles 68 locally changed paths

results.summary: Verified published release identities, reproduced and validated v0.3.0 and v0.4.0 packages from immutable tags, and classified the v0.3.0 target plan as 433 base-identical replacements, 49 absent adds, 4 already-current files, 68 locally changed reconciliations, and 1 target-only path.
tests_run: Git/file SHA-256 three-way classification: 555 paths accounted for
results.residual_risk: Target predates governed package inventory, so v0.1.0 path identity alone cannot authorize replacement.
